assertions.title: Tree-sitter AST parsing works for R, Python, and TypeScript

steps.action: Install synthesis extra dependency (tree-sitter-language-pack) via uv sync --extra synthesis
steps.observed: Installed tree-sitter==0.25.2, tree-sitter-language-pack==0.13.0 and 3 other packages

steps.expected: All 53 AST parser tests pass covering R, Python, TypeScript parsing
steps.observed: 53 passed in 0.16s — 11 language detection tests, 8 Python parsing tests, 10 R parsing tests, 11 TypeScript parsing tests, 7 file parsing tests, 3 error handling tests, 3 model tests

evidence.summary: 53 passed, 0 failed. Tests cover: language detection (extension + shebang), Python function/import/test extraction, R function/library/require/source/testthat/describe extraction, TypeScript function/import/describe/it/test/arrow/class/TSX extraction, file parsing from disk, error handling with partial results, ParseResult model serialization.

assertions.title: Test mutation induces controlled failures and is revertable via diff/patch

steps.action: Run: uv run pytest tests/test_mutation.py -v -k 'test_apply_mutation or test_revert_mutation or test_creates_diff or test_mutations_are_revertable'
steps.observed: 6 passed in 0.12s — diff creation (with changes, no changes, context), apply to string, apply to file, revert to string, revert to file, pipeline-level revert verification

evidence.summary: 6 passed, 0 failed. Tests verify: mutations change source correctly, reverts restore original source exactly, file-level apply/revert works, pipeline-generated mutations are all revertable, diffs are created with proper context.

assertions.command: uv run pytest tests/test_mutation.py -v -k 'test_apply_mutation or test_revert_mutation or test_creates_diff or test_mutations_are_revertable'

assertions.title: Mutation pipeline generates task descriptions automatically

steps.action: Run: uv run pytest tests/test_mutation.py -v -k 'test_description or test_pipeline_generates_task_descriptions'
steps.observed: 5 passed in 0.11s — descriptions reference mutation details, missing imports, type errors, expected fixes, and pipeline generates meaningful descriptions for all successful mutations

evidence.summary: 5 passed, 0 failed. Tests verify: descriptions reference specific mutations (e.g. 'add', 'subtraction'), mention missing imports by name ('math'), reference type-related terms ('type', 'string', 'str'), produce descriptions >20 chars with expected fix guidance, and pipeline generates task IDs and descriptions for all successful mutations.

assertions.title: Mutation diversity produces varied tasks (3+ categories, 10+ tasks)

steps.action: Run: uv run pytest tests/test_mutation.py -v -k 'test_diverse_mutation_types or test_produces_10_plus_tasks or test_all_categories_exist or test_at_least_three_categories'
steps.observed: 4 passed in 0.11s — MutationType enum has 5 categories (LOGIC_BUG, MISSING_IMPORT, TYPE_ERROR, WRONG_RETURN_VALUE, EDGE_CASE), pipeline produces 3+ distinct categories and 10+ tasks from sample Python source

evidence.summary: 4 passed, 0 failed. Tests verify: MutationType enum contains LOGIC_BUG, MISSING_IMPORT, TYPE_ERROR, WRONG_RETURN_VALUE, EDGE_CASE (5 categories >= 3 required), pipeline produces at least 3 distinct mutation type categories from sample code, and produces at least 10 successful mutations.

assertions.command: uv run pytest tests/test_mutation.py -v -k 'test_diverse_mutation_types or test_produces_10_plus_tasks or test_all_categories_exist or test_at_least_three_categories'

assertions.title: Failed mutations are recovered gracefully (skip with logging, not crashes)

steps.action: Run: uv run pytest tests/test_mutation.py -v -k 'test_failed_mutations_gracefully_skipped or test_pipeline_with_invalid_source_does_not_crash or test_pipeline_with_empty_source'
steps.observed: 3 passed in 0.10s — failed mutations produce error details in results with logging, invalid syntax source does not crash pipeline, empty source returns empty list without crash

evidence.summary: 3 passed, 0 failed. Tests verify: failed mutations produce MutationResult with success=False and non-null error field, log messages contain 'skip'/'fail'/'error' keywords, pipeline handles invalid source code ('def broken(') without crashing, and handles empty source returning an empty list.

assertions.command: uv run pytest tests/test_mutation.py -v -k 'test_failed_mutations_gracefully_skipped or test_pipeline_with_invalid_source_does_not_crash or test_pipeline_with_empty_source'

frictions.description: tree-sitter-language-pack is an optional dependency under [synthesis] extra. Initial test runs failed with ModuleNotFoundError until 'uv sync --extra synthesis' was run. The task prompt stated 'uv sync (already done)' but this only installs core deps.
frictions.resolution: Ran 'uv sync --extra synthesis' to install the tree-sitter-language-pack and associated packages. All tests then passed.

summary: Tested 5 assertions for synthesis milestone: all 5 passed (VAL-SYNTH-01, VAL-SYNTH-02, VAL-SYNTH-03, VAL-SYNTH-04, VAL-SYNTH-06). Total test count across all assertions: 71 selected tests passed, 0 failed. One friction noted: the synthesis extra dependency was not pre-installed.
